title: guidonia fragilis
side_effects: Guidonia fragilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive problems. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap may lead to skin lesions, rashes, and increased risk of infection. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can also trigger respiratory issues, such as asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath.
